top_signals.title: US and Iran Make ‘Progress’, Aim to Keep Hormuz Open
top_signals.summary: The US and Iran made “encouraging progress” in talks on a peace deal and will continue technical-level discussions this week, according to mediators Qatar and Pakistan. Bloomberg's Stuart Livingstone-Wallace breaks down what we know so far. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Shipments Through Hormuz Pick Up on Back End of Ceasefire
top_signals.summary: Oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz picked up on Friday after the United States and Iran signed a ceasefire deal, with Gulf producers preparing to raise exports despite concerns over conditions set by Tehran for using the vital waterway.Washington…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China Targets US Rare Earths Firms in Response to Pentagon List
top_signals.summary: China has imposed export controls against two US rare earth producers that are part of Washington’s effort to reduce its dependence on Beijing by establishing an alternative supply chain for the critical minerals.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
top_signals.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Kazatomprom CEO Meirzhan Yussupov on uranium markets, China and nuclear growth
top_signals.summary: Kazatomprom’s CEO discusses disciplined uranium growth, AI-fuelled nuclear demand, trade routes and Kazakhstan’s role in the fuel cycle.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Klue OAuth breach victim list grows as Icarus hackers claim attack
top_signals.summary: Market intelligence platform Klue has publicly confirmed a recent security incident that allowed threat actors to steal OAuth tokens used to connect to customers' Salesforce environments, as the new "Icarus" extortion group publicly claims the attack. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: A market, a state, and a treaty
top_signals.summary: Inside an interview with the CEO of Kazatomprom, the world's largest uranium producer.

top_signals.title: EnCore OK’d to build South Dakota’s first ISR uranium mine
top_signals.summary: Dewey Burdock is expected to process 1 million lb. of uranium per year, recovering more than 14 million lb. over its 28-year life.

top_signals.title: Major Newmont mine Cadia halted after earthquake: report
top_signals.summary: The mine has been suspended for the second time in nine weeks.

top_signals.title: Irish Consultancy Opens Its Doors for Offshore Wind, Subsea Markets
top_signals.summary: A new engineering design and commercial advisory company focused on offshore wind, subsea transmission and marine infrastructure projects has launched in Ireland under the name of Insight Marine, targeting growing demand for specialist support…
